parameter.name: name
parameter.description: The Solace connection name to use.

parameter.name: destinationType
parameter.description: Destination type: TOPIC or QUEUE (default: TOPIC).

parameter.name: destinationName
parameter.description: Name of the topic or queue to publish to.

parameter.name: deliveryMode
parameter.description: Delivery mode: DIRECT, PERSISTENT, or NON_PERSISTENT (default: DIRECT).

parameter.name: messageType
parameter.description: Message type: TEXT, BYTES, or XML (default: TEXT). JSON payloads are auto-detected and carried as TEXT.

parameter.name: correlationId
parameter.description: Correlation ID for the message.

parameter.name: priority
parameter.description: Message priority (0-255).

parameter.name: timeToLive
parameter.description: Time to live in milliseconds.

parameter.name: applicationMessageId
parameter.description: Application-defined message ID.

parameter.name: applicationMessageType
parameter.description: Application-defined message type.

parameter.name: senderId
parameter.description: Sender ID for the message.

parameter.name: replyToDestinationType
parameter.description: Reply-to destination type: TOPIC or QUEUE.

parameter.name: replyToDestinationName
parameter.description: Reply-to destination name.

parameter.name: userProperties
parameter.description: Custom user properties as JSON object for content-based routing and filtering (e.g., {"region":"US","priority":"high"}).

parameter.name: dmqEligible
parameter.description: Whether the message is eligible for the Dead Message Queue (true/false).

parameter.name: elidingEligible
parameter.description: Whether the message is eligible for eliding (true/false).

parameter.name: expiration
parameter.description: Absolute message expiration time as a UTC epoch in milliseconds (0 means no expiration).

parameter.name: waitForAck
parameter.description: If true, block for the broker ACK before returning (PERSISTENT/NON_PERSISTENT only). Default: false.

parameter.name: ackTimeout
parameter.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for the broker ACK when waitForAck=true. Default: 10000.

parameter.name: continueOnAckFailure
parameter.description: When true, a NACK or ACK timeout does not throw. Inspect 'solace.ack.status' (ACK|NACK|TIMEOUT) to handle the outcome. Default: false.

parameter.name: responseVariable
parameter.description: The name of the variable to which the output should be stored.

parameter.name: overwriteBody
parameter.description: Replace the Message Body in Message Context with the response of the operation.
